nodes.bodyText:
Block run start when sprint placeholders are unresolved
evaluateWizard only blocks unresolved sprint placeholders while sprintPromptShown is false, so after any call to withSprintPlaceholderValues (including an empty or partial payload) promptRequired becomes false and readyForRun can become true even though sprintScopedPlaceholders still contains missing keys. Because startRun gates solely on readyForRun, this allows runs to start with missing sprint-scoped inputs and produces incomplete run context.
Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.

Restore agent phase when Safe Mode is disabled
When safe mode is turned off, nextPhase is set to the current phase, but enabling safe mode already forced that phase to 'evidence'; an on→off toggle therefore leaves the run stuck in the evidence phase instead of returning to normal agent execution flow. This breaks run-control continuity for active sessions unless another separate action rewrites the phase.
Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.

Operator remediation update for unresolved codex threads.

Commit: 9319d0f300907b9dbf96fe98f236697a87cf5404

Thread PRRT_kwDORZ8p_M5yJIoE fixed:
- Enforced unresolved sprint placeholders as a hard run-start blocker in `src/s09/setup_wizard.ts`.
- Added regression test `blocks run until all sprint placeholders are resolved` in `src/s09/s09.test.ts`.

Thread PRRT_kwDORZ8p_M5yJIoH fixed:
- Restored pre-safe-mode phase on disable and cleared safe-mode waiting reason in `src/s09/shell_state.ts`.
- Added assertions in `AT-S09-03` for phase restoration and waiting reason clear.

Validation receipts:
